use_cases: Displaying focused content that overlays the page without navigation
Confirmation dialogs for user actions like deletions or signouts
Form submissions within a contained modal interface
Revealing additional details or settings on demand
Temporary context switching for focused user tasks
ai_summary: A lightweight, reusable modal component with backdrop blur effect and smooth motion animations for opening and closing. Supports keyboard navigation (ESC to close), click-outside-to-close, and multiple size variants. Built with motion/react for fluid transitions and usehooks-ts for outside click detection.
